title: Do Hunger Gamerule
description: Ever wanted no hunger? Or play peaceful but with hunger? Now you can with this brand new Game Rule doHunger!
body:
Ever wanted to play Peaceful, but with hunger? Or you wanted to play Minecraft without worrying about food?
This mod adds a new gamerule: The _doHunger_ gamerule. You can modify this gamerule the same way as any gamerule by: - Changing the Game Rule in the World Creation screen. - Changing the Game Rule by enabling commands and running /gamerule doHunger true|false The doHunger gamerule toggles the use of Hunger in Minecraft.
If doHunger is true (default) then hunger will work as normal. If doHunger is false, then the hunger bar will remain full.
